title: Section 16
content: 1[16. Relief that may be claimed by the petitioner.-- A petitioner may claim either of the following declarations:-- (a) that the election of the returned candidate is void; (b) that the election of the returned candidate is void and that he himself or any other candidate has been duly elected.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 20 of 1977, s. 2, for Part III.
